commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3a85ba22634c4a081ec1908df656176a5b332f96)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces Sharp with Photon for OpenClaw image operations, updates WhatsApp image preview fields, removes Sharp dependency surfaces, updates shrinkwrap/package-extension handling, and refreshes image tests and docs.

PR surface: Source +125, Tests +180, Docs +3, Config +3, Other -732. Total -421 across 26 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main only fail-closes unknown image metadata for forced backends, while this PR makes default auto mode fail closed before backend fallback. I did not run tests or mutate the checkout because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR has a protected label, a dirty branch, and a backend support-matrix decision that is not an automation-safe repair.

target.title: Replace Sharp image backend with Photon
target.body:
Summary
- Replace the packaged Sharp image backend with Photon for metadata, resize-to-JPEG, PNG alpha-preserving resize, and EXIF orientation normalization.
- Keep HEIC/HEIF/AVIF conversion on system tools only, with docs updated for the converter requirement.
- Remove installed Sharp package surfaces, keep Baileys' Sharp peer optional in generated shrinkwraps, and prepopulate WhatsApp image thumbnails/dimensions via OpenClaw image ops before Baileys upload.
- Move test image generation off Sharp and add real fixture coverage for Photon edge cases, including grayscale-alpha PNG and PNG compression level handling.

Verification
- pnpm build
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/media/image-ops.input-guard.test.ts src/media/web-media.test.ts src/agents/tool-images.test.ts src/agents/tool-images.log.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/screenshot.test.ts src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts src/media/store.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/media.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/send.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/send-api.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply.web-auto-reply.compresses-common-formats-jpeg-cap.test.ts test/scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose
  - 16 files passed, 335 tests passed
- env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed
- pnpm why sharp --prod --depth 6
  - no output
- rg -n '^import sharp|import\("sharp"\)|from "sharp"|node_modules/sharp|@img/sharp' src extensions test package.json npm-shrinkwrap.json pnpm-lock.yaml extensions/whatsapp/npm-shrinkwrap.json extensions/media-understanding-core/package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml -g '*.*'
  - no matches
- git diff --check
- autoreview --mode local
  - clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported

Real image comparison against Sharp
- tesco-shop.jpg source sharp=1200x630 photon=1200x630 jpeg sharp=13700/320x168 photon=15800/320x168
- mobile-ui-screenshot.png source sharp=360x727 photon=360x727 jpeg sharp=5746/158x320 photon=7206/158x320
- roborock-screenshot.jpg source sharp=435x685 photon=435x685 jpeg sharp=12914/203x320 photon=16074/203x320
- whatsapp-openclaw.jpg source sharp=471x1024 photon=471x1024 jpeg sharp=11612/147x320 photon=13419/147x320
- openclaw-logo-text.png source sharp=1768x363 photon=1768x363 jpeg sharp=6940/320x66 photon=9512/320x66 png sharp=19058/320x66 photon=22127/320x66

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: OpenClaw image processing no longer installs or imports Sharp for core/WhatsApp image paths; Photon handles core resize/metadata/orientation/PNG work, external tools handle HEIC/HEIF/AVIF conversion, and WhatsApp image uploads keep thumbnails/dimensions without Baileys' broken Jimp fallback.
Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout, Node/pnpm repo build, Photon backend, temporary isolated Sharp install only for fixture comparison.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm build; focused Vitest command above; env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed; Sharp dependency/import scans; real-image comparison script; autoreview local.
Evidence after fix: build passed; focused tests passed 16/16 files and 335/335 tests; changed gate passed; Sharp prod dependency tree empty; Sharp install/import scan had no matches; real-image dimensions matched Sharp across five repository fixtures; autoreview clean.
Observed result after fix: Photon output preserved source and resized dimensions across JPEG/PNG/WebP fixture paths; WhatsApp image payloads now include precomputed jpegThumbnail, width, and height before Baileys upload; generated shrinkwraps omit installed Sharp packages while preserving Baileys peer optionality.
What was not tested: Live WhatsApp send against a linked account; cross-platform HEIC/HEIF converter availability beyond the macOS sips conversion test path; pixel-level perceptual equivalence against Sharp beyond dimension and encoded-size comparison.
target.author: steipete
